/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -g CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/config.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/player.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/metadata.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/cache.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/discover.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/cover_art.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/ui.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/ui_player.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/ui_browse.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/ui_search.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/logger.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/src/util.c.o CMakeFiles/bluxir.dir/lib/cJSON.c.o -o bluxir  -lncursesw -ltinfo /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lexpat -lavahi-common -lavahi-client -lpthread -lm
